title: LNCP Phase-6 Summary Output Schema
description: Schema for Phase-6 Summary output. Phase-6 synthesizes all prior phases into a cohesive summary with High-Intent reflection and a suggested next step. Output varies based on Phase-4 mode (Prompting vs Guidance).

phase6_version.description: Version of the Phase-6 output format

source_contract_version.description: Version of the LNCP contract this output derives from

source_phase4_mode.description: Which Phase-4 mode was used (determines summary variation)

synthesis_scope.description: Scope constraint inherited from upstream phases

summary.description: The main synthesis summarizing the analysis

title.description: A brief, evocative title for this analysis

structural_overview.description: 2-3 paragraphs summarizing structural patterns from Phase-2. Should be 2-3x longer than individual Phase-2 outputs, interpretive but non-directive.

semiotic_synthesis.description: 2-3 paragraphs weaving together Phase-3 syntheses into a unified interpretation. Should explain how the three semiotic lenses relate to each other in this sample.

mode_reflection.description: 1-2 paragraphs reflecting on the Phase-4 content (prompts or guidance) and how they might serve the writer. Varies based on source_phase4_mode.

present.description: Whether any High-Intent markers were detected

overview.description: 1-2 paragraphs interpreting the High-Intent profile. Non-directive; describes what is present, not what should be.

epistemic_stance.description: Characterization of the writer's epistemic stance based on marker distribution. OPEN = more possibility/hedging; CLOSED = more certainty/emphasis; BALANCED = mixed; MINIMAL = few markers.

interpretation.description: Brief interpretation of how this marker shapes meaning in context

notable_markers.description: Up to 3 notable High-Intent markers with interpretations

next_step.description: Suggested next step for the writer

prompt_text.description: The suggested next step, phrased as an invitation

rationale.description: Why this next step is suggested, based on the analysis

title.description: Name of the future exercise or round

description.description: Brief description of what this exercise involves

availability.description: Whether this exercise is currently available

forward_pointers.description: Pointers to future exercises, rounds, or features

llm_enhanced.description: Whether this output was enhanced by LLM expansion (true) or is template-only fallback (false)

enhancement_notice.description: If llm_enhanced is false, this contains a notice about enhanced analysis being available
